generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that collect temperature data from the physical building environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that collect occupancy data from the physical building environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyUsageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that collect energy usage data from the physical building environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyUsageDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyUsageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyUsageSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data collected from building environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data collected from building environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance EnergyUsageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy usage data collected from building environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyUsageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with runtime sensor and actuator data for comprehensive semantic representation of physical asset"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data exchange between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for IoT data exchange and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling and semantic enrichment of building assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering principles for automated transformation pipelines and evolution of digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insights for facility management and decision support"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations for facility management and decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from building simulations for life cycle optimization"
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for life cycle optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy consumption through automated control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of visual comfort through automated control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAction
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insights for facility management and decision support"
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building infrastructure using Unreal Engine 5 for facility management and decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insight for optimizing energy consumption based on predictive analytics"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insight for optimizing visual comfort based on predictive analytics"
]

instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insight for non-visual health effects optimization based on predictive analytics"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC systems for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting or blinds for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HeatingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator in Building Control System for heating adjustments"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller in Building Control System for lighting adjustments"
]

instance VentilationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller in Building Control System for ventilation adjustments"
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure within AECO domain for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization of physical assets"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, EnergyUsageSensor, HeatingActuator, LightingController, VentilationController
]

instance ModularArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points supporting service-oriented DT development"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT and sent to physical actuators and controllers through Eclipse Hono and Ditto to adjust building operations in response to simulations and analytics."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical and virtual components, with continuous data exchange and immediate response to environmental changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular architecture orchestrated by a central DT framework that integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and BIM as the semantic backbone, with standardized extension points for service-oriented components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with BIM serving as a semantic backbone for all stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness, ensuring accurate reflection of physical assets."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, leveraging IoT communication protocols for bidirectional communication between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points enabling integration with external systems and services, supporting scalable, service-oriented DT development across heterogeneous AECO environments."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards and use of standardized extension points for interoperability, addressing fragmented data sources and lack of standardized integration mechanisms in AECO."
]
